flux_limiter_superbee.accuracy: O(dx^2) in smooth monotone regions; compressive near discontinuities; degrades at smooth extrema
flux_limiter_superbee.reference: Roe (1986), Ann. Rev. Fluid Mech. 18:337-365, eq. (36); Sweby (1984), SIAM J. Numer. Anal. 21(5):995-1011, fig. 4

sweby_bounds.comment: Sweby (1984) region: phi(r) >= 0 for all r, phi(r) = 0 for r <= 0, phi(r) <= 2 and phi(r) <= 2*r for r > 0, phi(1) = 1. Superbee sits on the upper edge of the second-order TVD region.

formula.comment: phi(r) = max(0, min(2*r, 1), min(r, 2)) — the superbee limiter of Roe (1986).

flux_limiter_superbee.composition_hint: Caller computes slope ratio r = (q_i - q_{i-1}) / (q_{i+1} - q_i) at each interface and multiplies the high-order slope correction by phi(r). See discretizations/finite_volume/README.md for the worked example.
